findings.description: Unused imports: avg and sum imported from drizzle-orm but raw sql template used instead

review_summary.ip4_002_services: APPROVED — clean tRPC router with uuid validation, protectedProcedure, proper K8s error handling, output schemas
review_summary.ip4_003_namespaces: APPROVED — adminProcedure on mutations, DNS-1123 regex validation, protected namespace guard, DELETE confirmation
review_summary.ip4_004_metrics: APPROVED — aggregatedMetrics with proper SQL grouping, clean summary computation
review_summary.ip4_005_discovery: APPROVED — adminProcedure gated, no credential leaks, dedup against existing DB entries
